data.name: Subtitle
data.value: The processing speed depends on the file size and your system's performance.

data.name: NoiseThreshold
data.value: Noise Threshold, adjust to your preference:

data.name: AudioPreview
data.value: Everything below the red line will be detected as silence and removed:

data.name: ProcessCompleted
data.value: Process completed! The download should start automatically.

data.name: AnalyzingAudio
data.value: Phase 1/2: Analyzing audio and detecting silence...

data.name: NoSilenceDetected
data.value: No silence detected with current settings.

data.name: DropFileHere
data.value: Drop your file here, everything will be processed locally.

data.name: FileTooLarge
data.value: The selected file ({0} MB) is too large. Maximum allowed size is {1} MB.

data.name: LargeFileWarning
data.value: The selected file is {0} MB and may take a long time to process. Do you want to proceed?

data.name: UnableToReadFile
data.value: Unable to read the selected file: {0}

data.name: OnlyMp4Allowed
data.value: Only MP4 files are allowed. Please select an MP4 video.
